title: CL configuration
description: Add configuration for Character leveling with mods.
body:
CL - this is an abbreviation that means [character leveling](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/character-leveling-up).

You can also see this mod on:

MCreator - [link](https://mcreator.net/modification/104851/cl-configuration)
CurseForge - [link](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cl-configuration)

This mod is well suited for modpacks that have the CL mod installed.
This mod adds compatibility with mods:

- Bakery - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-bakery](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-bakery)
- HerbalBrews - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-herbal-brews](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-herbal-brews)
- Brewery- [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-brewery](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-brewery)
- Vinery - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vinery](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vinery)
- Meadow - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-meadow][https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thermal-expansion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thermal-expansion)(https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-meadow)
- Supplementaries - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/supplementaries](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/supplementaries)
- Farmer's Delight - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight)
- Create - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create]- (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create)
- Create Crafts & Additions - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/createaddition](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/createaddition)
- L_Ender 's Cataclysm - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lendercataclysm](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lendercataclysm)
- Thermal Foundation - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thermal-foundation](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thermal-foundation)
- Thermal Locomotion - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thermal-locomotion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thermal-locomotion)
